title: Molachu Moonu Lyrics Velayutham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Prasanna, Supriya Joshi
Lyrics: Annamalai
Song: Molachu Moonu

[Molachu moonu yelaye vidala
tharuven olaga azhagi medala
Veralu vendakka, on-kaadhu avarakka
Mooku molaga, mookuthi kaduga
kanindha kaai thottam neethana](2)

Vayaso pathinanju, adi vaadi maam pinju
Paavom en nenju,ena paarthu ne konju
Paarvai thirupaachi, un theendal nerupaachu
Unna paarthale, en paalam meruvaachu

Hey kaanapinaanu, nee azhaga irukuriye
Kangal rendum maada veyil enna porikiriye
Imaigal moodaamal, konjam paarvai paakuriye
Anju nodiyil, nenju kuzhiyil, enna podhaikiriye

Odambellam macha kaari, usupethum kachikaari
idhamana muthakaari, mosakaari
Odambellam macha kaara, usupethu kachaikaari
idhama mutthakaaa meesakaara          (Molachu moonu yelaye ..)

Siripu kalkandu, on-sinungal anukundu
Vizhigal karuvandu, adi vilundhen adhai kandu
Unadhu negam keeri, en udambil thalumberi
Alarum naal thaedi, en aaval thirukaachu

Hey dhinusu dhinusaaga, dhinam kanavil thonuriye
Udaiya thiruppi, usura varuthi, paduthi edukuriye
Mulusu mulusaaga, enna mulunga ninaikiriye
Odamba murukki, valayal norukki, kadhaiya mudikiriye

Meydana pallathaakke, midhamana soorai kaatre
puriyaadha ellaikode, muthachoodey
Kaadhoram kaadhal pechey, adangadha arivaal veeche
uyarada uyirin peche, yedho aachey   (Molachu moonu yelaye ..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Molachu Moonu?

The song conveys the emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of Velayutham related to this song?

This song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Molachu Moonu?

The song is sung by Prasanna and Supriya Joshi.

Who composed the music for Molachu Moonu?

The music is composed by Vijay Antony.

When was Molachu Moonu released?

The song was released on August 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Molachu Moonu, the characters express their deep affection for each other through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song captures the essence of romance, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in Velayutham. With its vibrant energy and emotional depth, it evokes feelings of joy and love. The collaboration between the talented singers and the music director adds a unique charm to this beautiful melody.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Molachu Moonu from Velayutham is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Prasanna and Supriya Joshi, paired with Vijay Antony's captivating music, this song is sure to resonate with anyone in love. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings together heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes.
stanzaMeanings: I will give you everything in the world, beautiful one. If you want, I will give you my heart. Your nose is beautiful, and the flower garden is blooming.
At the age of eighteen, I am feeling shy. My heart is trembling, looking at you. Your gaze is like a fire, and seeing you makes my heart race.
Hey, I am lost in your beauty. Both my eyes are searching for you. Without closing my eyes, I am trying to catch a glimpse of you. In five moments, my heart is sinking.
My body is like a fire, burning with desire. This is a beautiful feeling, but it’s also a bit dangerous. My body is burning, but it’s also a bit sweet.
With laughter, I am thinking of you. My eyes are searching for you, and I am lost in thought. Your beauty is captivating, and I am drawn to you.
Hey, day by day, I am seeing you in my dreams. I am turning around, trying to find you. I am thinking of you in every moment, and my body is restless.
In the open space, the sweet sound of music is flowing. It’s like a beautiful melody that never ends. Love talks are endless, and life is full of surprises.
